summary: Frontend-only regression on Banner carousel focused on mobile auto-scroll pause/resume and manual scroll while a tile is active. All 5 targeted behaviours verified on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800). No console errors.

test_results.mobile_auto_scroll_pauses_while_active: PASS - after tapping centred tile (idx 4), scrollTop delta over 3.2s = 0.00 (auto-scroll fully paused)
test_results.mobile_manual_scroll_works_while_paused: PASS - manually set scrollTop 1829->2029; over next 3s delta from post-set = 0.00 (auto-scroll not fighting user; setting scrollTop is honoured)
test_results.mobile_auto_scroll_resumes_after_deselec: PASS - after clicking same panel index to deselect, mobile-text hidden (0 visible), scrollTop then advanced 192.00 over 3.2s (>5 required)
test_results.mobile_tap_reveal_real_content: PASS - titles observed only 'RADIOGROEP','127','KOODH' (3 real articles x3 copies = 9 panels); no 'Voorbeeldproject' FALLBACK. Active tile body starts with 'Vanuit de dagelijkse praktijk ontstond het idee voor 127.be:...' (real 127 content)
test_results.desktop_hover_reveals_title_and_body: PASS - after mouse.move onto centred .group, 1 panel-title-wrap and 1 panel-excerpt-wrap reach opacity>0.5
test_results.no_console_errors: PASS - 0 console errors on both viewports across the full test run

critical_code_review_comments: Banner.jsx is 484 lines - approaching but under the 700-line split threshold; consider extracting Panel and CircularText into separate files for maintainability.

activeRef is manually synced inside the setActiveIdx updater callback - works, but two sources of truth (state + ref) can drift if a future edit updates one without the other; a useEffect syncing activeRef to activeIdx would be safer.
The rAF idle condition (line 315-318) also drives colour/tilt updates - when idle==false, those still update (good); confirmed by observation. No issue found, just noting the coupling.
-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch is applied via camelCase (WebkitOverflowScrolling) - correct for React inline style. Verified manual scroll works on the emulated mobile viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Banner Iteration 7: mobile pause-while-active + manual-scroll-freedom + resume-on-deselect verified via JS-driven .group clicks on the centred [data-testid=carousel-panel]. IMPORTANT for future tests: to deselect a tile you must click the SAME panel index (activeIdx toggles by index); if you recompute 'centred panel' after manual scroll you may click a different index and end up activating a NEW tile instead of deselecting. Also, wait >2200ms after any wheel/touch/manual scroll before measuring auto-scroll resume (lastInteractRef debounce).
